title: ruta graveolens subsp. hortensis
intro: Ruta graveolens subsp. hortensis, also known as garden rue or herb of grace, is a subspecies of the Ruta graveolens plant, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, containing essential oils such as limonene and pinene, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions like acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Ruta graveolens subsp. hortensis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce pain, and soothe digestive issues.
